package rulecoverage

func PositiveGoPerfLayerAsyncConcurrencyContextTimeoutAllocatedPerInnerCall() string {
    ruleID := "go_perf_layer_async_concurrency_context_timeout_allocated_per_inner_call"
    family := "performance"
    severity := "contextual"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "Layer: Async and concurrency. Flag context.WithTimeout creation inside tight retry loops when an outer deadline would suffice."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
